$comment: Quill branding + theme config. Edit this file in-place on a running instance — the next page load picks up the changes (no rebuild, no restart). For PWA shortcuts already installed on a device, the OS-cached launcher icon won't update until you reinstall the PWA.
name: Quill
defaultSystemPrompt: You are a helpful AI assistant.
$welcomeMessageNote: If set, rendered as the first assistant bubble whenever the chat is empty (kiosk or not). Markdown supported. Leave empty to show the default 'Start a conversation.' placeholder.
welcomeMessage: Hi, I'm the Cordfuse assistant. Ask me about Quill, Crosstalk, llmux, or anything Microsoft Learn covers — I'll pull live docs as needed.
$starterPromptsNote: Clickable pill chips below the welcome bubble. Each prompt is sent verbatim as the user's first message on click. Empty array hides the chip row. Especially useful for kiosk deployments — turns the empty surface into a guided menu.
starterPrompts: How do I deploy Quill in kiosk mode?
What MCP servers does this instance have wired up?
Show me the latest Microsoft Graph permissions reference.
$iconNote: Paths served by the /branding/* route, which streams files from config/icons/. Drop your PNGs into config/icons/ and reference them here as /branding/<filename>. icon192 drives the browser favicon AND the PWA 192 icon; icon512 is PWA only. PWA installs already on a device may keep the OS-cached launcher icon until reinstalled.
$themesExample: Add as many entries as you want. Each theme overrides every CSS custom property the app uses. category is 'dark' or 'light'. swatches is a 3-color preview shown in the Settings picker. The 'cordfuse' entry below is a working example — delete it or replace it with your brand.
